NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) HEARING SET FOR MAY-02-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-02-2006 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER ON MOTION FOR ORDER STRIKING CLAIM AND CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-21-2006 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER STRIKING CLAIM IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT
ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER STRIKING CLAIM, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) HEARING SET FOR JUN-21-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 610

POS OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $781.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT NATALIE CELO-ROA. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $781.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jun-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. Petitioner People of The State of California's motion for order striking claim IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers
Off Calendar May-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Pamela Underwood for petitioner and moving party People of the State of California

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Claimant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 15 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
